item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident is now resolved. The impact was between 16:25 PT / 23:25 UTC and 16:33 PT / 23:33 UTC.

item.title: Claude.ai unavailable and elevated errors on the API
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has now been resolved. The timeline for the elevated errors was 6:22 PT / 13:22 UTC -> 6:39 PT / 13:39 UTC.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has now been resolved. The elevated error rate for Haiku 4.5 was between 4:53 PT / 11:53 UTC and 5:36 PT / 12:44 UTC.

item.title: Claude Code Code Review was intermittently failing
item.description: [none] resolved — Claude Code Code Review intermittently wasn't starting sessions.

item.title: Elevated billing related errors on Claude.ai
item.description: [none] resolved — This incident has been resolved.
